title: Bushy's Wild Expanded
description: Bushier ground flora: enhances leaf litter, petals, and wildflowers with vanilla and mod support, plus configurable options.
body:
![Resourcepack thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f424abe8ff41ccc913672e9e619a88701df8dc4.png)

**Bushy’s Wild Expanded** enhances ground flora by making elements like leaf litter, petals, and wildflowers denser, fuller, and more immersive. ([Check gallery section!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bushys-wild-expanded/settings/gallery))

It improves **vanilla features** and **extends support to additional mods**, creating a richer and more natural-looking environment.

**Vanilla includes**:
 - Leaf Litter
 - Pink Petals
 - Wildflowers

**+ Modded support**, including:
 - Biome O’ Plenty (e.g. white petals)
 - Regions Unexplored (e.g. maple leaf litter and more)
 - More coming in future updates
   - Also supports **Vanilla Backport Mod** for 1.21.1 & 1.20.1. 

**Fully configurable (Respackopts support)**:

This resource pack supports **[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts/versions)**, allowing you to customize its features. For example, you can keep pink petals and leaf litter enabled while disabling wildflowers, all directly from the resource pack settings menu.

**Credits & Compatibility**
- This pack is based on:
  - Bushy Pink Petals, Wildflowers & Leaf Litter by godhusk

You do not need these packs separately — **Bushy’s Wild Expanded** includes their vanilla features and expands them with support for popular mods, with more to come in future updates.

> Feel free to use this resource pack in modpacks or personal projects. ♡
> Please do not reupload this pack on other websites.
Instead, share the original Modrinth page.
